# Vendored Trade Assets

This directory contains the minimum vendored assets copied from the upstream `crypto_trade_plot` project for local integration inside this repository.

Current contents:

- `generate_mock_data.py`: deterministic trade mock-data generator
- `crypto_transactions_30d.csv`: sample transaction dataset for local adapter and seeding work

These files are treated as vendored source material for the local `TRADE` integration path.
